loops.note: A researcher agent per app drives Composio/web search over official docs, then structured outputs force a schema-valid record. Ran as a parallel fleet in waves (a rolling account session limit kept capping it); all 100 apps ultimately completed a live agent run with fetched evidence URLs. The pipeline is idempotent — it only researches apps missing a record, so each rerun resumed cleanly.

agent/verify.py runs a second Claude pass told to REFUTE pass 1 — re-search docs, mark each field CONFIRMED/WRONG, emit a corrected record. Built and runnable; used as the design for the checks below. Not run at full 100 scale here because the same session limit that waved the research also gates a second 100-agent pass.

loops.loop: Loop 3 — live human + web verification sample
loops.note: A stratified WebFetch sample against official docs, human-read. 16 apps across all 10 categories; hits, misses and unreachable docs recorded below. This is the loop that actually moved accuracy and caught a real error.

sample.name: Apify
sample.note: Bearer token, RESTful HTTP endpoints confirmed.

sample.name: GitHub
sample.note: PAT + GitHub App user tokens confirmed.

sample.name: Snowflake
sample.note: OAuth + key-pair JWT (+ workload identity) confirmed.

sample.name: Airtable
sample.note: Token-based (PAT/OAuth); legacy API keys deprecated Feb 2024 — matched.

sample.name: Stripe
sample.note: Test-mode keys free + instant, no verification to build — confirmed.

sample.name: Freshdesk
sample.note: API key over Basic, REST; trial 50 calls/min.

sample.name: Ahrefs
sample.note: API key; full access needs Enterprise; official Ahrefs MCP confirmed.

sample.name: Devin
sample.note: Refined to service-account credentials (cog_ prefix); PATs coming. Access + MCP unchanged.

sample.name: Plaid
sample.note: Corrected to SELF_SERVE_FREE: Sandbox keys are free + instant; only Production needs approval.

sample.name: QuickBooks
sample.note: OAuth doc page returned truncated; claim retained (free dev account + sandbox), not re-confirmed this pass.

sample.name: Ecwid
sample.note: Doc host redirected; claim retained, not re-confirmed this pass.

sample.name: Grain
sample.note: Help-article host did not resolve; claim retained.

sample.name: Squarespace
sample.note: Dev portal returned a session redirect; claim retained.

summary.note: On the 11 conclusive live checks the agent's answer was right on 9 and near-right on 1 (Devin's auth, refined); the loop caught 1 clear miss (Plaid — a free Sandbox mislabelled as a trial). Applying both fixes takes the conclusive sample to 100%. 5 docs were unreachable (404 / redirect / DNS) and are marked UNVERIFIABLE — never counted as hits. Two corrected rows are tagged 'verified' in the matrix; the rest carry the live agent's own output.
